input: Run embedding strategy on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected embedding strategy output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the embedding strategy workflow

input: Apply embedding strategy to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive embedding strategy analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to embedding strategy
